heading: Applicable procedure
label: 31103 Applicable procedure
text: A civil action under this chapter is subject to the provisions of chapter 309 of this title except to the extent inconsistent with this chapter.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3110346 App.:782 (last sentence words before last comma).(last sentence words before last comma), .Mar. 3, 1925, ch. 428, § 243 Stat. 1112
